descriptionZh: 生命科学与健康实验室规则

spacingOverrides.reason: Life science BSL equipment requires wider clearance for gowned personnel
spacingOverrides.reasonZh: 生命科学BSL设备需要更宽的间距以适应穿戴防护服的人员

spacingOverrides.reason: Biological fume hoods need extra clearance for safe sample handling
spacingOverrides.reasonZh: 生物通风柜需要额外间距以确保样品安全操作

ventilationOverrides.reason: Life science labs handle volatile reagents and biological aerosols requiring higher air changes
ventilationOverrides.reasonZh: 生命科学实验室处理挥发性试剂和生物气溶胶，需要更高的换气次数

ventilationOverrides.reason: Biological waste generates higher aerosol risk than standard chemical waste
ventilationOverrides.reasonZh: 生物废物比标准化学废物产生更高的气溶胶风险

additionalAdjacency.reason: Life science labs benefit from proximity to BSL areas for sample transfer
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: 生命科学实验室宜靠近生物安全区域以便样品转移

additionalAdjacency.reason: PCR workflows require direct access from sample prep areas
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: PCR工作流程需要从样品制备区域直接进入

additionalAdjacency.reason: Lab coats and PPE donning should occur near lab entry
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: 实验服和防护装备穿戴应在实验室入口附近进行

notes: Life science labs must comply with institutional biosafety committee (IBC) protocols in addition to these rules.
notesZh: 生命科学实验室除遵守以上规则外，还须遵守机构生物安全委员会(IBC)协议。
